creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #4)

Thanks for the pointers.  In the meantime I've did a few build runs on an 14.0-CURRENT host with a 14.0-CURRENT jail (both at 1400042 base 20aa359773 amd64) and all of them had no problems so far.  Every build run had devel/py-Jinja2 and devel/py-zipp among various other ports in its batch.

I mainly use poudriere-devel, but I also did some build runs with poudriere 3.3.7, again without any issues.

Could you please tell me the git hashes of your 14.0-CURRENT host and 14.0-CURRENT jail?

I can also vaguely remember a few staging errors with various Python ports.  However, the errors only happened by chance when the memory of the build host was used up quite heavily.
